name: @tank/laravel-mastery
description: Production Laravel development from v11+ onward. Eloquent ORM patterns, routing, Blade/Livewire/Inertia frontends, queues, events, authentication (Sanctum/Breeze/Fortify), Pest testing, service container, caching, and deployment (Forge/Vapor/Docker/Octane). Triggers: laravel, eloquent, laravel model, pest php, laravel api, laravel livewire, laravel deployment, laravel queue, laravel sanctum.
